config.slap-key.name: Fish Slap Key
config.slap-key.tooltip: Press this key after catching a fish to slap it.
config.dive-slap-key.name: Dive Slap Key
config.dive-slap-key.tooltip: Press this key during the BobberBar to jump into the water and slap the fish.
config.hide-key-prompts.name: Hide Key Prompts
config.hide-key-prompts.tooltip: Hide the on-screen key prompts that appear during fishing.
config.mobile-button.name: Enable Mobile Buttons
config.mobile-button.tooltip: Show on-screen Dive / Slap buttons to the right of the farmer.
hud.dive-slap-success: {{player}} jumped into the water in a rage and gave the {{fish}} {{slap_num}} slaps in {{time}} seconds, successfully knocking it out!
